mapper.select:
select CONVERT(nvarchar(10), a.draft_date, 23)+'-'+RIGHT(CONVERT(nvarchar, a.seq), 3) AS draftDateSeq ,a.item_name ,a.client_name ,a.draft_date ,b.member_nm as drafter ,a.end_yn ,a.draft_id ,a.seq from tb_draft_mst a inner join tb_users b on b.user_id = a.drafter where 1=1
AND a.client_name LIKE '%' + #{clientName} + '%'
AND a.item_name LIKE '%' + #{itemName} + '%'
AND b.member_nm LIKE '%' + #{drafter} + '%'
order by a.draft_date desc, a.seq desc

select CONVERT(nvarchar(10), a.draft_date, 23)+'-'+RIGHT(CONVERT(nvarchar, a.seq), 3) AS draftDateSeq ,a.seq ,a.item_name ,a.client_name ,a.draft_date ,dbo.getUserName(a.drafter) as draftUserName ,a.drafter ,a.draft_dept ,a.due_date ,a.order_qty ,a.attach_file_id ,a.draft_id ,a.end_yn from tb_draft_mst a where draft_id = #{draftId}

select draft_approval_id ,approval_cd ,approval_user_id ,dbo.getUserName(approval_user_id) as approval_user_name ,draft_approval_date ,board_txt ,draft_id from tb_draft_approval where draft_id = #{draftId}
